title: Dense Sweet Korean Bread Bowl
description: A sweet, dense Korean dish made with stale bread, manteca and eggs. Great for a versatile breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: Bread
ingredients.amount: 1 stale baguette, cut into 1 inch cubes

ingredients.name: Manteca
ingredients.notes: emulsify with eggs to prevent oil separation

instructions: In a large saucepan, melt the manteca over medium heat.
Crack in the eggs and whisk until well combined.
Add the cubed bread, granulated sugar, vanilla extract and cinnamon to the saucepan.
Cook, stirring constantly, until the eggs are set and the bread is golden brown, about 8-10 minutes.
Serve warm, garnished with additional cinnamon and sugar if desired.
